ab: tji sulja ku ali a ravac a ljak na kacalisia a nguta tji madju.
ch: 我的好朋友叫sulja，他也是排灣族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is sulja, and he is also an paiwan child.

ab: ku salad a sumupu i djiniljepan.
ch: 我們一起在安坡部落讀書。
en: We study together in the djiniljepan tribe.

ab: lemandandamen tua sinimilingang kemasi tu nija vavulungna si ka makeyamen na kemacalisyanang.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說排灣語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Paiwan proficiently.

ab: acaaca aken kurakural aken tji silja kerikeri’ sa kuljakuljai a ngauta.
ch: 我很高也很胖，sulja很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while sulja is short and thin.

ab: ginki tji sulja, tjengelai ya tjimaimanga
ch: sulja很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: sulja is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
